sourceMovie.title: Old Guy
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Old Guy (2024) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Simon West's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Shaft
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Old Guy clicked for you, Shaft (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Old Guy?
faq.answer: Try Shaft, Accident Man, Debt Collectors—each shares DNA with Old Guy while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Old Guy?
faq.answer: Old Guy (2024) is best described as Action, Comedy, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Old Guy worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
